---
title: "Max Clifford"
listing: false
about:
  id: intro-heading
  template: trestles
  image: Max.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/mcliffo1
---

<div>

Hello! I'm Max, a Senior Student-athlete at Macalester College studying Data Science and Portuguese. When I'm not busy being active, I like to dabble in some data science! Check out my projects on the similarly named tab!

<div>

## Education

Macalester College \| St. Paul MN <br>

B.A. in Data Science \| Portuguese Minor \| Sept 2022 - May 2026 <br>

GPA: 3.8

## Accolades

Macalester Scots Football Captain

[All-MIAC Offensive Line](https://athletics.macalester.edu/news/2025/11/24/football-clifford-named-all-miac-green-litchford-receive-honorable-mention.aspx) <br>

[College Sports Communicators Academic All-District Team](https://athletics.macalester.edu/news/2026/1/6/football-macalester-places-eight-on-academic-all-district-team.aspx) <br>

[Academic ALL-MIAC](https://athletics.macalester.edu/news/2026/1/29/recruiting-miac-recognizes-88-scots-with-fall-academic-all-miac-honors.aspx) <br>

Dean's List

[Hampshire Honor Society](https://athletics.macalester.edu/news/2026/4/8/football-ten-scots-inducted-into-hampshire-honor-society.aspx)

### Get in Touch

Email: [mcliffo1\@macalester.edu](mailto:mcliffo1@macalester.edu) <br>

Phone: 303-598-9849 <br>

[Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/in/maxwellclifford1/)

</div>

</div>
